Participant: Identifier for the participant from whom the sample was taken.
Experiment: Identifier for the specific experiment or batch.
Channel: Identifier for the channel or type of measurement.
Type: Indicates whether the sample is natural (NAT) or a tumor.
Smoking.History: Detailed smoking history of the participant.
Smoking.History_modified: Simplified smoking history of the participant.
Stage_mod: Simplified clinical stage of the condition (II).
Country.of.Origin: Country of origin of the participant (USA).
Ethnicity_mod: Patient's ethnic background with varied case.
Cigarettes.per.Day: Number of cigarettes smoked per day.
QC.status: Quality control status of the sample.
TP53.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in TP53 gene, e.g., Missense_Mutation.
PTEN.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in PTEN gene, e.g., In_Frame_Del, Nonsense_Mutation.
CDKN2A.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in CDKN2A gene, e.g., Missense_Mutation, Nonsense_Mutation.
KMT2D.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in KMT2D gene, e.g., Nonsense_Mutation, Missense_Mutation.
NFE2L2.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in NFE2L2 gene, e.g., Missense_Mutation.
ARID1A.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in ARID1A gene, e.g., Missense_Mutation.
CUL3.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in CUL3 gene, e.g., Nonsense_Mutation, Missense_Mutation.
BRCA2.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in BRCA2 gene, e.g., Frame_Shift_Del, Frame_Shift_Ins.
KEAP1.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in KEAP1 gene, e.g., Missense_Mutation.
SUZ12.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in SUZ12 gene, e.g., Frame_Shift_Del, Splice_Site.
NF1.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in NF1 gene.
PIK3CA.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in PIK3CA gene, predominantly missense mutations.
NOTCH1.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in NOTCH1 gene.
TP53.mutation.status: Binary status indicating presence (1) or absence (0) of TP53 mutation.
PTEN.mutation.status: Binary status indicating absence of PTEN mutation.
CDKN2A.mutation.status: Binary status indicating absence of CDKN2A mutation.
KMT2D.mutation.status: Binary status indicating absence of KMT2D mutation.
NFE2L2.mutation.status: Binary status indicating absence of NFE2L2 mutation.
ARID1A.mutation.status: Binary status indicating absence of ARID1A mutation.
CUL3.mutation.status: Binary status indicating absence of CUL3 mutation.
BRCA2.mutation.status: Binary indicator for BRCA2 gene mutation status.
KEAP1.mutation.status: Binary indicator for KEAP1 gene mutation status.
SUZ12.mutation.status: Binary indicator for SUZ12 gene mutation status.
NF1.mutation.status: Binary indicator for NF1 gene mutation status.
PIK3CA.mutation.status: Binary indicator for PIK3CA gene mutation status.
NOTCH1.mutation.status: Binary indicator for NOTCH1 gene mutation status.
CUL3.NFE2L2.KEAP1.mutation.status: Binary indicator for CUL3, NFE2L2, and KEAP1 gene mutation status.
KAT6A.cna.wes: Copy number alteration (CNA) status for KAT6A gene from whole-exome sequencing.
SOX2.cna.wes: Copy number alteration (CNA) status for SOX2 gene from whole-exome sequencing.
TP63.cna.wes: Copy number alteration (CNA) status for TP63 gene from whole-exome sequencing.
FGFR1.cna.wes: Copy number alteration status of FGFR1 gene from whole exome sequencing.
CDKN2A.cna.wes: Copy number alteration status of CDKN2A gene from whole exome sequencing.
CDKN2A.pathway.alteration: Alterations in the CDKN2A pathway, such as amplifications or deletions.
CDKN2A.pathway.alteration.status: Binary indicator (0 or 1) for presence of alterations in the CDKN2A pathway.
PIK3CA.pathway.alteration: Alterations in the PIK3CA pathway, such as amplifications.
PIK3CA.pathway.alteration.status: Binary indicator (0 or 1) for presence of alterations in the PIK3CA pathway.
FGFR3.TACC3.fusion.rna: Binary indicator (0) for absence of FGFR3-TACC3 fusion transcript.
TCGA.RNA.cluster: RNA expression cluster classification (e.g., Classical, Basal) from TCGA.
NMF.subtype: Non-negative matrix factorization subtype classification (e.g., Classical, Basal inclusive).
NMF.subtype.core: Core subtype classification from NMF analysis (e.g., Classical, Basal inclusive).
NMF.subtype.membership.score: Likelihood of sample belonging to a specific subtype.
CIN.wes: Complexity index of numerical values, possibly related to genomic instability.
Smoking.Signature.Fraction.wes: Fraction of mutations attributed to smoking.
Smoking.Signature.Count.wes: Count of mutations characteristic of smoking exposure.
Total.Mutation.Count.wes: Total number of mutations identified in the sample.
Mutation.Count.ExcludingINDELs.wes: Count of mutations excluding insertions and deletions.
DNP.Count.wes: Count of specific double nucleotide polymorphisms.
DNP.Count.GG.to.TT.or.CC.to.AA.wes: Count of specific double nucleotide changes.
Smoking.score.wes: Score indicating the contribution of smoking to mutation patterns.
Smoking.Score.Category.wes: Categorization of smoking influence on mutation patterns.
Mutation.Count.Excluding.Silent.wes: Count of non-silent mutations in whole exome sequencing.
Total.Mutation.Count.per.Mb.wes: Total mutation count per megabase in whole exome sequencing.
TCGA pan-can immune clustering: Immune cluster classification based on TCGA pan-cancer analysis.
ESTIMATE.StromalScore.rna: RNA-based stromal score from ESTIMATE algorithm.
ESTIMATE.ImmuneScore.rna: RNA-based immune score from ESTIMATE algorithm.
ESTIMATE.TumorPurity.rna: RNA-based tumor purity estimate from ESTIMATE algorithm.
TSNet.Purity.rna: RNA-based tumor purity estimate from TSNet method.
ImmuneCluster.rna: Immune cluster classification based on RNA expression.
xCell.ImmuneScore.rna: xCell immune score based on RNA expression.
xCell.StromaScore.rna: xCell stromal score based on RNA expression.
xCell.MicroenvironmentScore.rna: RNA-based score indicating the cellular microenvironment quality or condition.
CIBERSORT.AbsoluteScore.rna: Absolute RNA score from CIBERSORT, likely representing cell type abundance in a sample.
